name: Swordfish with Mustard-Basil Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first three ingredients in a small bowl.
2. Prepare the barbecue or preheat the broiler. Brush the grill with vegetable oil.
3. Season the fish with salt and pepper.
4. Grill the fish just until cooked through, about 3 minutes per side.
5. Transfer to plates.
6. Top each fillet with a spoonful of mustard-basil butter.
7. Garnish with basil sprigs and serve.
